channel.title: Anto Subash - llama
channel.description: Full-stack developer passionate about web technologies, microservices, and modern software development.

item.title: Building an AI-Powered .NET API with Ollama and Microsoft.Extensions.AI
item.description: Learn how to create an intelligent .NET API using Ollama, Microsoft.Extensions.AI, and implement function calling capabilities with Large Language Models.

item.title: Ollama Semantic Kernel Connector With C#: Console App & API Guide
item.description: In this post, we will learn how to use the Ollama Semantic Kernel Connector with C#.

item.title: Getting started with Ollama and Semantic Kernel with C#
item.description: In this post, we will learn how to get started with Ollama and Semantic Kernel with C#.
